description: Petition. Report fragment, probably early Ayyubid period (taqbīl clause + paleography + reused by Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi, whose documents cluster ca. 1190–1210; see description of recto of this document). Difficult to decipher. Contains a registration mark in faded (iron gall?) ink, unless this is the concluding phrase of the Judaeo-Arabic letter.
tags: Report, DIMME, taqbil, registration mark, lost archive
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
